TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ciliksay alang Ciliksay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 155 buwan, 372 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 270 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 102 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 69%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciliksay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciliksay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciliksay hya' ga Hikasiki go. tay mkraya' na Ciliksay hya' ga Nakahama go. tay mkraya' na Ciliksay hya' ga Madawdaw. tay mkyahu' na Ciliksay hya' ga Kahciday. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj alaŋ ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħikas~ɕiki ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħama ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ma*aw*aw. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa kaħʦ~ʨi*aj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: Ciliksay alang Ciliksay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 155 buwan, 372 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 270 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 102 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 69%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciliksay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciliksay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciliksay hya' ga Hikasiki go. tay mkraya' na Ciliksay hya' ga Nakahama go. tay mkraya' na Ciliksay hya' ga Madawdaw. tay mkyahu' na Ciliksay hya' ga Kahciday. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj alaŋ ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħikas~ɕiki ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħama ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ma*aw*aw. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiliks~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa kaħʦ~ʨi*aj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
